markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, process automation, and team transition.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Monday.com Process:** A new intake form will automate content approvals, routing drafts to the correct Solution Engineer (SE) via Slack to eliminate manual handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Product Feature Matrix:** A new matrix was created to fact-check product details in drafts, preventing AI-generated inaccuracies. It requires review by Phil.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** 10 articles are publishing this week, clearing a backlog. A new 5-day SLA for SE reviews will enable a consistent 5 articles/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Team Transition:** Erik O'Brien is the new GrowthX POC, leading the long-term growth team with Gabrielle as Managing Editor.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & SLA

  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Published: 4 articles](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Publishing this week: 10 articles (clears backlog)](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Pending review: 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**New SLA:** A 5-day turnaround for SE reviews (per 5 articles) will enable a consistent 5 articles/week publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### New Monday.com Approval Process

  - [**Goal:** Automate content approvals entirely within Monday.com, replacing the current manual process (Aida → Amanda → Yasine → Upload).](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Mechanism:** A new intake form field ("Required Product Review") will trigger an automation.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Selection:** User chooses review type (e.g., "Financial Audit").](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Action:** Automation sends a Slack notification to the correct SE.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Decision Pending:** Jenny will confirm with Amanda whether GrowthX or Fieldguide will make the review type selection.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Product Feature Matrix

  - [**Purpose:** Fact-check all product-related info in drafts to prevent AI-generated inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Content:** Tables and descriptions of the Fieldguide platform, sourced from internal docs (e.g., Notion).](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Action:** Yasine will share the matrix with Phil for review.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Gong & HubSpot Access

  - [**Gong:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Access:** Aida has access; Erik and Gabrielle need it. Yasine will ping IT to resolve Suleman's invalid invite link.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Analyze transcripts for recurring customer pain points to inform keyword research and article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**HubSpot:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Walkthrough:** Scheduled for next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Plan:** After gaining access, add internal links between published articles to boost SEO and crawlability.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

### Team Transition

  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [**POC:** Erik O'Brien (leads long-term growth team).](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [**Managing Editor:** Gabrielle.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Status:** Transition confirmed and ready to proceed.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Notify GrowthX when the new Monday.com board is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [Share the Product Feature Matrix with Phil for review.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [Ping Amanda to prioritize pending content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Ping IT to resolve Suleman's invalid Gong invite.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Meet with Ali (Sales Enablement) to get a list of recommended Gong recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new articles by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [Attend the HubSpot walkthrough next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/sSwCMVysBsSKPt1VphCy7wLSAG8YirC2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
